2026-04-06T19:21:24.0667004Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0667447Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0667822Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0668160Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0668402Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0668565Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0668744Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0668915Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0669184Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-06T19:21:24.0669403Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m

2026-04-06T19:23:01.5197916Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-06T19:23:01.5198131Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-06T19:23:01.5198474Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-06T19:23:01.5198594Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
